_README: OPTIMISTIC critical-path plan for the NR4A3 PROTAC-degrader paper (ChemRxiv preprint + JCIM).
This file is the SINGLE MACHINE SOURCE the daily status email projects into a day-by-day calendar.
HUMAN-READABLE MASTER (read this for the full rationale + 'what's next'): degrader-paper-plan-v2-ordered.md.
Milestone `id`s here match the stage tags in that master plan one-for-one. Keep the two in sync:
when work lands, update each milestone's `status` and, for an in-progress item, `remaining_days`.
The email walks the milestones in dependency order from *today* and assigns optimistic start/finish dates.
Durations are OPTIMISTIC planning estimates ('if all goes to plan'), NOT commitments - GPU spot capacity
waits, failed shards, and red-team findings routinely add days. `status`: done | in_progress | pending.
`track`: gpu | cpu | write | submit.  `parallel_ok`: true = may overlap other legs up to the 8-wide spot quota.
2026-07-15 (external reviewer-AI verdict: CONDITIONAL APPROVAL WITH 5 MANDATORY CHANGES). The naive
three-step spine (RBFE -> NR-V04 -> prospective) is SUPERSEDED by a 3-kinds-of-validation architecture.
Verbatim verdict + rationale: nr4a3-degrader-reviewer-revisions-2026-07-15.md. The five changes:
(1) separate implementation/ACCURACY (public measured-ddG benchmark) vs target PRECISION (cmpd19 = CONDITIONAL
hypotheses, no experimental pose) vs TERNARY known-answer control (VHL-BRD4/SMARCA2) - NR-V04 is a
biological holdout, NOT the ternary calibrator.
(2) cryptic-pocket affinities are CONDITIONAL (dG_bind|open); observable = dG_open + dG_bind|open, and dG_open
differs per paralogue so it is part of selectivity. Either estimate dG_open per paralogue or report
everything as explicitly conditional. Delete 'true binding likely stronger' (bias goes either way).
(3) ABFE reframed: T4L is an implementation SMOKE TEST, not a transferable offset; report RAW; ABFE does NOT
prove 'binds at all' (only pose-plausibility). HELD until Val A passes + opening penalty handled + multiple
poses + no T4L offset. Free-cmpd19 ABFE != each degrader's binary affinity.
(4) NR-V04 celastrol is COVALENT (C551) -> needs covalent adduct model + C551A control + noncov/cov sensitivity
+ warhead-only/recruiter controls; report DIRECTIONAL CONCORDANCE, never 'recovered degradation'.
(5) prospective matrix = hypothesis PRIORITIZATION only: staged gates + PARETO (not a tunable scalar score);
model EWSR1::NR4A3 in fusion context, lysines beyond the LBD, full CRL/E2~Ub ensembles. Matrix arithmetic
is 24-36 before controls (not 6-12) -> preregistered cheap-screen downselection preserving diversity.
LANGUAGE: 'predicted selective candidate' (not 'selective hit'); 'predicted NR4A-paralogue-selective';
'compatible with the hypothesized conditional bound state' (not 'binds at all'); never imply efficacy/safety/
therapeutic-window/clinical-readiness; cmpd19 MYC induction is a LIABILITY, not benefit.
PROCEED NOW: Step 0 + Validation A + Step 1 pilot (+ cheap CPU supports). HOLD Step 9 (ABFE) and Step 8
(prospective matrix) until their gates are green.

milestones.title: Step 0: get RBFE running on OpenFE + managed-spot GPU (infra shakeout - NOT science yet)
milestones.note: The GPU job running RIGHT NOW. Working out the mechanics of driving OpenFE RBFE on a managed-spot instance (edge 401->lo_m0_NCCO as the shakeout edge). Re-dispatched ~7x on 2026-07-15 while fixing an ExecuteUserScriptError. Prerequisite for ALL science. Done = one edge completes end-to-end with a sane dG.

milestones.title: Validation A: compact PUBLIC RBFE accuracy benchmark (measured ddG) through the EXACT NR4A pipeline
milestones.note: Mandatory change 1A. 10-20 transformations from 1-2 curated congeneric series with MEASURED ddG + supported poses + similar charge-state complexity + some receptor flexibility, run through the EXACT container/protocol/FF/water/sampling/analysis used for NR4A. Purpose = verify OUR implementation (target ~ OpenFE public weighted pairwise RMSE ~1.7 kcal/mol over 58 systems - we check our build, not re-run that benchmark). Cycle closure / fwd-rev / MBAR overlap are PRECISION diagnostics, NOT accuracy. GATE: Step 1 fan-out + any absolute-affinity work do not proceed unless this behaves adequately. NEW SPEND (not in the pre-reviewer plan): ~$60-180 spot (10-20 edges x ~8-15 GPU-h; g5 spot). Pin a tighter number from the Step-0 edge's realized GPU-h before launch.

milestones.title: Step 1 pilot: cmpd19 CONDITIONAL relative FE, 1-2 edges + replicas + pose/state sensitivity
milestones.note: Mandatory change 1B. REFRAMED: conditional relative free energies for a HYPOTHESIZED cmpd19 binding mode within preselected open NR4A conformers. cmpd19 has NO measured affinity + NO pose - tests reproducibility + receptor-sensitivity of the model, NOT correctness of the pose. Independent replicas + pose/state sensitivity. Early-abort if pathological. Runs parallel with Val A; fan-out gates on BOTH.

milestones.title: Validation B: known-answer NONCOVALENT ternary benchmark (VHL-BRD4 or VHL-SMARCA2)
milestones.note: Mandatory change 1C. A system with an EXPERIMENTAL ternary structure + measured binary/ternary affinity or cooperativity + a small analogue/linker series. Calibrates the ternary method against ground truth and FIXES the preregistered scoring rules. GATE: the prospective matrix (Step 8) never runs unless this passes. NR-V04 is a biological HOLDOUT, not the calibrator. NEW SPEND (not in the pre-reviewer plan): ~$100-250 spot (larger ternary complexes; ~4-8 linker-series edges + cooperativity legs).

milestones.title: NR-V04 feasibility: covalent celastrol (C551) parameterization + reduced control panel
milestones.note: Mandatory change 4. Build the preformed COVALENT celastrol-NR4A1 (C551) adduct model; noncovalent-vs-covalent sensitivity; NR4A1 C551A control; warhead-only + active/inactive recruiter controls. Pilot-one-leg gate on the full NR-V04 retrospective - abort/adjust if covalency dominates or the reduced panel misbehaves. Geometry/param can start in parallel; the ternary FE spend waits. NEW SPEND: ~$40-100 spot (small control panel, reused geometry).

milestones.title: Step 1 fan-out: cmpd19 congeneric map, 8-wide (conditional hypotheses)
milestones.note: GATE: only if Validation A passed AND the Step 1 pilot behaved. Fan out the congeneric perturbation map across druggable 8XTT conformers, release-derived NR4A3 conformers, matched NR4A1/NR4A2 open conformers, resolved microstates. Rank by worst conformer AND receptor-effect-exceeds-conformer-effect, as CONDITIONAL hypotheses with sensitivity ranges (no synthetic ensemble affinity). NMR/release frames without known populations are NOT pooled as equally populated.

milestones.title: NR-V04 retrospective: preregistered biological-selectivity holdout (directional concordance)
milestones.note: Run the full NR4A1/2/3 ensembles through the physics + ubiquitination pipeline with NO tuning, preregistered scoring (fixed on Validation B), VHL-inactive epimer as negative functional control. Report DIRECTIONAL CONCORDANCE/DISCORDANCE with the known NR4A1-degraded / NR4A2.NR4A3-spared outcome - NEVER 'recovered degradation'. 1 positive + 2 spared receptors is too few to validate a general ranking model - stated as such.

milestones.title: Step 8: prospective matrix - hypothesis PRIORITIZATION only (staged gates + Pareto, fusion context)
milestones.note: Mandatory change 5. GATE: only if Validation B passed AND NR-V04 is at least directionally concordant. Enumerate {2-3 warheads} x {2 exit vectors} x {VHL,CRBN} x {3 linkers} = 24-36; downselect to ~6-12 by a PREREGISTERED cheap screen preserving warhead/exit-vector/ligase/linker diversity. Select by STAGED GATES -> PARETO FRONT (binary -> ternary -> linker strain -> ubiquitination geometry -> physchem/synthetic), uncertainty on every axis; NOT a tunable scalar score. Model EWSR1::NR4A3 in FUSION CONTEXT; lysines beyond the LBD (hinge/DBD/fusion-partner); DNA/chromatin sensitivity; FULL CRL/E2~Ub geometry ensembles. Deliverable = predicted selective CANDIDATES; degradation experimentally UNVALIDATED.

milestones.title: Step 9 (OPTIONAL, HELD): conditional ABFE on the cmpd19 anchor - pose-plausibility, RAW, no offset
milestones.note: Mandatory change 3. HELD - as originally framed, NOT worth running (interpretability, not cost). Launch ONLY after Val A passes + opening-state penalty handled (dg_open_paralogue OR conditional interpretation accepted) + multiple plausible poses handled + no T4L offset applied. Report RAW ABFE as POSE-PLAUSIBILITY (is the hypothesized pose thermodynamically plausible under the modeled assumptions), T4L discrepancy reported SEPARATELY. Does NOT prove 'binds at all'. EXPENSIVE (multi-leg GPU, ~$80-200 spot) - needs a provider + budget nod before launch (state provider in advance).

milestones.title: Supporting: dG_open per paralogue (cryptic-pocket opening free energy) - the Mandatory-Change-2 fix
milestones.note: Mandatory change 2 (preferred path). Converged, uncertainty-bearing pocket-opening free energy per paralogue so observable affinity = dG_open + dG_bind|open and per-paralogue opening penalties enter SELECTIVITY. If NOT run, ALL affinity/selectivity results must be reported as explicitly CONDITIONAL on the selected open states. Feeds selectivity claims + Step 9. EXPENSIVE-ish (enhanced sampling) - right-size before launch.

milestones.title: Supporting: public EMC VHL/CRBN expression analysis (informs ligase choice)
milestones.note: Mandatory change 5 support. Public-data VHL + CRBN expression in EMC samples - informs VHL-vs-CRBN choice for the matrix. Free CPU; route networked data fetch via a CI runner (egress-proxy rule).

milestones.title: Supporting: harmonized pocket-tracking re-analysis (finalize Gate 2 druggability wording)
milestones.note: Cheap CPU; not a headline step - finalizes the paper's Gate-2 druggability wording.

milestones.title: Fold all results into paper (+ SI), apply language discipline, QM/torsion + physchem/retrosynthesis
milestones.note: Single source of truth = nr4a3-degrader-paper.md (+ SI). Apply ALL reviewer language discipline (predicted candidate / conditional bound state / directional concordance; no efficacy/safety/window/clinical claims; cmpd19 MYC induction as liability). Add targeted QM/torsion validation at degrader linker junctions + physicochemical + retrosynthetic assessment of the final matrix. Re-render figures. Fold conditional ABFE (if run) as pose-plausibility only.

milestones.title: Final red-team + review-response pass (honest-weight every claim; medical-integrity check)
milestones.note: Reviewer-AI block before the outward-facing post/submit step.

milestones.title: Post ChemRxiv (CC-BY) + submit JCIM + send outreach emails
milestones.note: OUTWARD-FACING / irreversible - needs trimcrae sign-off (not auto). This is the finish line.

shelved._reason: Broad DE NOVO warhead GENERATION stays parked per the ternary-first strategy (denovo_401 is at most a side comparator). ABFE is NOT shelved but is HELD + REFRAMED as a conditional pose-plausibility calc (abfe_conditional) per the 2026-07-15 reviewer verdict - see nr4a3-degrader-reviewer-revisions-2026-07-15.md. The old transferable-T4L-offset framing and the 'RBFE proves it binds at all' / 'absolute anchor' framing are RETIRED (reviewer mandatory change 3).
